# BMAD Framework — AI Development Agents

This workspace uses the **BMAD (Business Method for AI Development)** methodology.

## Installed Agents

- `.github/bmad-master.md`
- `.github/bmad-analyst.md`
- `.github/bmad-pm.md`
- `.github/bmad-architect.md`
- `.github/bmad-dev.md`
- `.github/bmad-qa.md`
- `.github/bmad-sm.md`
- `.github/bmad-solo-dev.md`

## How to Use

GitHub Copilot reads `.github/copilot-instructions.md` automatically for all workspace sessions.

> Use `@workspace` in Copilot Chat — the BMAD methodology context is injected automatically.
